objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, Address__c, Appointment_Reminder_Message_Template__c, Book_Confirmation_Message_Template__c, Business_Phone_Id__c, Business_Phone_Number__c, Cancellation_Policy__c, Email__c, Favicon_URL__c, Logo_URL__c, Manager_Contact__c, Pending_Payment_Message_Template__c, Phone_Number__c FROM AA_Business__c
SELECT Id, Name, Address__c, Business__c, Display_Name__c FROM AA_Business_Branch__c
